backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, implementing user profile management, page content storage, pricing entries, and access control with role-based permissions, while including a blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature to restore the 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section on AboutPage.tsx to its pre-Draft-177 layout and formatting.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key content.
frontend/ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration file that enables serving the .well-known directory for domain verification.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PaarWeg frontend with German language, SEO meta description, Plausible Analytics tracking, and the React app mount point.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com as the canonical domains for the canister.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public URLs for www.paarweg.com including the homepage, location landing pages, service pages, and legal page with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that defines all TanStack Router routes for the site, including main pages, admin routes, and three location-specific landing pages, wrapped with ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeHexCo: Admin UI card component that displays runtime-computed HEX color values for the page background and primary CTA button, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each color.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: Empty component file, likely a placeholder for a Calendly inline widget that has been removed or not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Site-wide layout component providing a sticky header with desktop and mobile navigation, scroll-to-top on route changes, and a footer; includes special reload logic when clicking Kontakt while already on that page.
frontend/src/components/MobileReadMore.t: Mobile-only collapsible content component that truncates long text with a gradient fade and a toggle button, controlled by a feature flag to enable or disable compacting behavior.
frontend/src/config/featureFlags.ts: Centralized feature flag configuration object; currently defines a single flag to enable or disable mobile 'Read more / Show less' content compacting behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useComputedThemeHexCo: React hook that reads runtime computed CSS styles via temporary DOM probe elements to derive HEX values for the background and primary button colors, recomputing on dark mode changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching hardcoded CSR metadata and generating a PKCS#10 CSR client-side using the Web Crypto API with RSA-2048 key pairs.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's warm sand/terracotta color theme, plus base body and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for Roland Soder, displaying his bio, credentials, and coaching philosophy with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and a hero section with photo.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: Landing page targeting couples in Basel for online couples counseling, with a scoped Google Tag (gtag) injection, video player controls, and SEO/OG meta tag setup.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and appointment booking page for PaarWeg, showing direct contact options (email, phone, Calendly) and an FAQ accordion, with SEO and Open Graph meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Couples coaching service page describing PaarWeg's offering for couples in all relationship phases, with a hero section, feature cards, a mobile read-more component, and SEO meta tags.
frontend/src/pages/CSRGeneratorPage.tsx: Admin/utility page that auto-generates an SSL Certificate Signing Request (CSR) on load using a React Query mutation, and provides copy-to-clipboard and file download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DomainVerificationPag: A diagnostic page that fetches `/.well-known/ic-domains` and displays whether the Internet Computer domain verification file is correctly configured for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for PaarWeg that sets SEO metadata (title, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data) and renders the hero section and feature cards for the coaching service.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Displays the Impressum (legal notice) and Datenschutz (privacy policy) information for Roland Soder Coaching, including contact details, liability disclaimers, and copyright notices.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: A coaching-focused page targeting men in relationships, with SEO metadata setup and a hero section describing the coaching offering for men seeking clarity and connection.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Displays transparent pricing for PaarWeg coaching sessions (60 CHF intro, 190 CHF full session) along with an FAQ accordion and SEO metadata including Open Graph and Twitter Card tags.
frontend/src/pages/SitemapPage.tsx: Renders a human-readable XML sitemap listing all public PaarWeg URLs with priorities and change frequencies, intended for submission to Google Search Console.
frontend/src/pages/SwissOnlineCouplesLan: Landing page for Swiss online couples counseling (PaarWeg) with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, JSON-LD structured data, and a hero section featuring a video player with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalStatusPage.t: Admin/diagnostic page that runs and displays status checks for DNS, SSL, WWW CNAME, 301 redirects, Plausible analytics, CSR generator, and domain resolution, along with a theme hex codes section.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Landing page targeting women in relationships for PaarWeg coaching, with SEO/OG meta setup and a hero section describing the coaching offering with a Calendly booking button.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: Zürich-specific couples counseling landing page that dynamically injects Google Analytics (gtag) scoped to this page only, sets SEO/OG meta tags, and renders a hero section with a video player.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely intended for Calendly type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Utility module providing functions to convert CSS color strings (rgb, rgba, oklch, hex) to uppercase HEX format, including an OKLCH-to-RGB conversion implementation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting values in sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, shadows, accordion keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3 for the PaarWeg project, recording an existing feature to restore the 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section on the About page and a pending action request for the same formatting fix.
